My current ask of $96.82 is way too high compared to the market. The spread between the highest bid ($82.43) and lowest ask ($84.95) is $2.52. My cost is $80.00, so any price above $80 is profitable. To be competitive and potentially secure trades, I should undercut the lowest ask of $84.95. I'll place my ask at $84.50 to become the most competitive seller while maintaining a healthy $4.50 margin above cost.
